events.text: Wrote the diagnosis to `/app/answer.json`: **pass**, low risk. The reported concern was checked in-service with steady readings, no abnormal sound/heat, and a completed functional check logged with no open punch note — no evidence of hanger/support distress (deformation, binding, overload, misalignment) per MSS SP-58 and project support standards, so it's closed out as verified-no-fault-found with continued routine surveillance.
